description: Celayix is an outstanding workforce management software. After we have implemented this, we were able to automate most of the painful and manual processes regarding payroll, attendance management, employee scheduling etc. I can say this has saved a lot of time and money by implementing.
author: Ganesh K.
pros: Celayix's solutions are designed to automate manual processes, reduce paperwork, and improve overall efficiency in managing workforce-related tasks. Its user-friendly interface is intuitive making it easier for me and other employees to easily navigate.
cons: There is nothing much that I least like about Celayix. For me that I felt was integration with multiple vendors is very limited. But most of the important integrations are in place as of now like Quickbooks, MS Dynamics etc. But it should have a broader integration that fits all the needs of different companies across the globe.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Excellent experience from the start. Any issues or questions that we have had have been answered very quickly.
author: Erica M.
pros: [sensitive content hidden] has been a HUGE help getting things set up. We are excited to have this roll out at the City of Kingston. As an employee the app is very convenient.
cons: From an employer perspective there could be improvements on the time off request side, however [sensitive content hidden] said these are in the works,
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Efficiency in workforce performance by maximising scheduling
description: Overall keeping track of employee time sheet is made easy with Celayix. You can easily track & calculate all sorts of employee off-time, vacations, sick leaves, personal day off's etc. Reports generated become hleps with payroll and increases overall communication within team.
author: Haroon A.
pros: What I like best is Celayix helps in employee scheduling, helping us manage workforce effectively. It also helps in eliminating overtime. Their monitoring systems enable employees to check-in/out on the web, or mobile too. Reporting data to payroll system is easy
cons: For large teams, there is always resistance when new systems are enforced, specially where there is a bit of a learning curve involved, employees sometimes resist this change. The overall UI of the app need a lot of improvement, specially if you are using mobile, & their time-sheet function could be done better.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Our overall experience with Celayix has been absolutely wonderful. From the detailed setup process to the step-by-step, in-depth training and support they provided during the implementation phase. Their team has ensured a smooth and efficient transition. Their dedication to customer service has truly set them apart.
author: MIKE S.
pros: The e-clock system is the best feature of the software. It provides a clear understanding of employees' clock in and clock out times, ensuring accurate time tracking. Additionally, the system includes a feature that alerts managers to various scenarios, making it an invaluable tool for efficient management and oversight.
cons: One drawback of the system is the inability to print a full calendar schedule. This limitation can be frustrating for those who prefer having a physical copy for reference and planning.

review_title: Why Celayix is the secret weapon for workforce optimization
description: Overall, Celayix has reduced the time we spend on manual scheduling and administrative tasks allowing me to focus more on strategy and execution.
author: Moses N.
pros: I like that I am able to efficiently assign the right members to the right projects, ensuring that we meet our deadlines without overburdening our employees,with its mobile app i can view schedules,track hours and communicate with employees on the go and very easily.
cons: So far so good,I appreciate its in build messaging tools which improve coordination between our members and the managers as well.

description: Very good experience with Celayix, it has been a huge value added to our company.
author: Jordan R.
pros: Very easy to use and adjust schedules on the fly. Many good features that help schedulers and employees.
cons: We use Greenshades for vacation tracking and there no good way to communicate it across without double entry.

description: I have it for several it has been a game changer in our bussiness
author: Jaime B.
pros: Friendly view, and accurate development.
cons: Still need to cross etime funtions to Schedule Express

description: good, it is efficient and does what my company needs it to do.
author: Lucia G.
pros: It is very accurate and is not delayed when reporting clock in and out.
cons: sometimes the app becomes glitchy and employees have to reset the app

description: It allows me to save time by scheduling online and tracking time on projects.
author: Fridah D.
pros: Celayix makes it seamless to track time on projects.Online scheduling is another great aspect.
cons: I slightly dislike that Celayix lack mobile apps.

review_title: Celayix Tracking Functions and the Real Time Reporting its Nice.
description: Excellent on various data reports creation, easy to manage project and through Celayix all our marketing data are easy to transfer and manage from one room.
author: Christine L.
pros: Useful on project time tracking and through the use of Celayix its quite smooth to manage all our marketing projects employees data from one platform. The timesheet management and even payroll management is easy and effective.
cons: Amazing project expense handling tool which is the easiest to implement and configure all the features before getting started.

description: We are new with cyllayix the team is using it as first time they are coming along with no big complaints and misunderstandings. over all experience it good
author: Atiq M.
pros: It made the scheduling very easy and more comfortable.
cons: So far there is no issue that i dislike about celayix.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Aanchal B.
pros: The time tracking is simple and check-in and check-out at shifts are really easy.
cons: The UI is not very intuitive and user friendly on the mobile platform.

description: Great! Celayix was very easy to learn as i went.
author: Michael E.
pros: Everything is in one place. Very easy to navigate.
cons: Some options are still being loaded; therefore, I have to use Etime still.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Long Time Celayix User -- First Option with New Agency
description: I have been using Celayix for 15 years. It is a huge upgrade from trying to create manual schedules via an Excel spreadsheet or by other manual processes. We were also able to use Celayix to link employees to training / re-training videos and you are able to export the schedules to other time keeping platforms such as Inflection HR or ADP.
author: Randall B.
pros: Setting up employees, schedules and creating templates is a breeze. Warnings when attempting to double book an employee or scheduling them off during leave eliminates these types of scheduling mistakes. Customer support is quick and responsive.
cons: I've been using Celayix in one form or another since 2008. Everything works well and as advertised, although I wish there was an easy way to print a schedule to post in Schedule Xpress.

review_title: Made easy for scheduling and time tracking
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: We were struggling with the time management and Celayix solves many issues for us. It shines with the efficient employee scheduling tools, easy work schedules and time off requests. Its overall user-friendly design and robust reporting features make it an effective solution for the management and time tracking. It also provides suggestions for finding the employee replacements and finally it saves time for us.
cons: It should be improved the view on phone and sometimes, need to refresh to get better performance.

review_title: HR management become smooth after implementing Celayix in our workspace
description: Celayix is good and easy to use for managing data about profitable projects, inventory, contracts, and team collaboration. I use it to keep track of my work hours, set my schedule, and review my timesheets. It's easy to adjust my schedule using this software.
author: Supriya P.
pros: The Celayix features are great in being flexible and responsive. They help us schedule and manage employee data effectively. With Celayix, it's simple to monitor work hours, schedules, and time off for our remote teams. The interface is user-friendly and easy to navigate.
cons: At first, I have seen that this tool is complicated and hard. But once it's customized and saved, it becomes really helpful and easy to use for us.

review_title: Long Time Celayix User -- first in our field
description: We really love our experience with Celayix. Have been using for a little over 10 years, and love the experience. The Customer Service provided and support is top notch.
author: Kasey T.
pros: We like the ease of use for both the schedulers and the employees. Our staff ranges in age from late teen to 90 years old, and they are all able to use the software quite comfortably.
cons: I wish there were more training videos about using certain areas -- like the time clock module.
author_profession: Guest Services Staff and Volunteer Manager

description: Really good.
author: Heidi K.
pros: Customer Service Support - very responsive and helpful. Help us figure out solutions to whatever we need.
cons: Two platforms, the web based platform and program. Have to go two places to do different things.

author: Jay Y.
pros: Viewing schedules all together, good look and flow
cons: Not being able to add to the employee notes

author: Shalini G.
pros: Overall experience is very incredible with this software. It allow me to track time or expenses, manage time sheets and much more related to workforce management. No doubt this is the best solution in my opinion.
cons: Tool is overall great nothing as such dislike from my side. I always recommend this tool.

description: That's great experience my side.
author: Manisha N.
pros: The clients has been a postive view of celayix and appreciate its products, agility and trustworthiness.
cons: It can be difficult to find certain things is celayix as it requires some exploration and searching.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Hassan A.
pros: With Celayix, it is easy to to time track as well as handle all employee scheduling needs It supports mobile access and leads to productivity
cons: Never had issues with Celayix. It is the best

description: I utilise etime xpress to choose my work hours, establish my hours, and rewiw my timesheets. This software makes it simple for me to modify my schedule.
author: Samee M.
pros: Celayix makes it easy to keep track of hours, schedules, and days off for remotes teams. The interface is very easy to use, you can get used to it .
cons: The team view for leaders can be complex and not easy to understand at first, but onces it is customized and saved, it becomes very usefull.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: This software product has been a wonderful, cost effective program for my staffing company to capture employee time and attendance, generate billing for these hours worked, and compile several statistical reports needed for my industry. It is very user friendly and Celayix worked hard to develop my program to meet all my specific needs. If I have a question, their continued support is always quick, efficient, warm and friendly.
author: Claudia N.
pros: Meets all my needs
cons: Can't think of a negative.

review_title: Celayix eTime Xpress and Web Xpress
description: We use this software to manage scheduling nearly 50 independent contractors in supporting our large client base with a number of different service types. We offer global support so we need to manage all time zones and their associated Daylight Savings Time changes so the integration with other calendars such as Outlook is a must! Our schedules are quite fluid and change often as our client's support needs change; we can schedule up to a year in advance or for the very next day! Our schedulers would be at loss without it! The functionality, search capabilities, filtering, and reporting are a must in our business! The Celayix help staff is incredibly supportive, responsive and are a joy to work with. We can't recommend this highly enough!
author: Vickie H.
pros: The filtering, search and reporting tools
cons: It is so feature rich is is hard to know if we are using it to its fullest potential.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
